pageContext.name: Blue and Beta Mini Co.
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Iron Studios are proud to announce the Blue and Beta Mini Co. Collectible Figure from the Mini Co. Series line.  These hand-painted collectible Blue and Beta figures were created by Iron Studios and are the perfect size for any desk or shelf no matter the size of your Jurassic Park collection.  A must-have for fans of Jurassic World Dominion collectibles!
